title: Reconcile RPL profile defaults
description: Align DIO SCHC rule assignment, DAO/DAO-ACK parent verification sequence, MRHOF formula/threshold/MAX_RANK_INCREASE, Trickle Imax encoding, and timing constants across core spec, appendix, draft, and implementations.
acceptance_criteria: One canonical profile table drives DIO rule, parent verification, MRHOF, Trickle, DAO lifetime/refresh, C/Python/Rust constants, and literal tests.
